name: Community Choice
description_short: Community Choice Credit Union is a federally insured, member-owned credit union serving Michigan with digital banking, low fees, and personalized financial advisory services.
description_long:
Community Choice Credit Union is a federally insured, not-for-profit credit union that has been operating long enough to celebrate its 90th annual meeting in 2026. Based on their website, they operate multiple member centers across Michigan and provide traditional credit union services with a focus on simplifying banking and delivering personalized service alongside modern digital tools.

The credit union offers a range of financial products and services including checking and savings accounts, personal loans, auto loans, home equity lines of credit (FlexChoice HELOC), and e-banking platforms with mobile app access. They provide access to over 30,000 surcharge-free ATMs nationwide and emphasize low fees as a core value proposition. Their offerings include specialized financial planning tools like Choice Map (for building financial wellness plans) and Targets (for goal-based savings organization).

Community Choice differentiates itself through strong community engagement, recording 13,359 volunteer service hours in 2025 and earning a Mastercard Doing Well by Doing Good Award. They have a notable track record serving niche markets, including cannabis businesses since 2020. Their website emphasizes 24/7 digital access combined with one-on-one personal advisor support, and they maintain high customer satisfaction ratings (4.8 stars on Google, 4.6 mobile app rating).

As a credit union, Community Choice is member-owned and NCUA-insured rather than FDIC-insured (a standard distinction for credit unions). Their current promotions highlight competitive rates, with FlexChoice HELOC introductory rates as low as 4.99% APR for 5 months. The organization appears well-established and community-focused, though membership eligibility requirements typical of credit unions would apply.
services: FlexChoice home equity line of credit (HELOC) with flexible terms
e-Banking platform with mobile app access
Choice Map financial wellness planning with personal advisors
Targets savings organization tool for goal-based savings
pros: Federally insured (NCUA) member-owned credit union structure with lower fees than banks
FlexChoice HELOC with introductory rates as low as 4.99% APR for 5 months
Choice Map financial wellness planning tool with personal advisors
Strong community engagement with 13,359 volunteer hours in 2025 and Mastercard award recognition
Specialized service for cannabis businesses since 2020
4.8-star Google rating and 4.6 mobile app rating with documented positive member testimonials
Multiple physical member centers across Michigan plus 24/7 digital access
cons: Membership eligibility likely restricted to Michigan residents or specific employer/association groups (typical credit union limitation not clearly detailed on homepage)
Limited geographic footprint to Michigan member centers despite nationwide ATM access
Website does not transparently display all loan terms, APRs, or membership requirements upfront
best_for: Michigan residents seeking a community-focused credit union with personal advisor support
Homeowners interested in flexible home equity lines of credit with fixed-rate options
Cannabis business owners needing financial services from an institution with specialized experience in the industry
Savers and borrowers prioritizing low fees and access to extensive ATM networks over large bank branches
diagnosis: Community Choice Credit Union is best for Michigan residents seeking a member-owned alternative to traditional banks with personalized service, competitive rates, and strong community ties. The primary caveat is that credit union membership typically requires eligibility criteria (geographic location, employer, or affiliation), and the website does not clearly spell out membership requirements, so prospective members should verify they qualify before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Community Choice — NCUA-insured credit union in Farmington Hill, MI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
